testing_centers.notes: NSE 4 and above via Pearson VUE test centers or OnVUE online proctoring
NSE 1, 2, and 3 are free self-paced online courses with proctored assessments on the Fortinet training portal

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required for Pearson VUE exams (NSE 4 and above). NSE 1-3 are completed online via the Fortinet training portal with no external ID verification.
exam_rules: NSE 4 and above: Closed-book exam via Pearson VUE. No notes, study materials, or electronic devices permitted. Personal items must be stored. No food or drink. NSE 1-3: Free online self-paced assessments; no proctoring. NSE 8 includes a separate written exam and an 8-hour hands-on practical lab.
renewal_options: NSE 4 through NSE 8 certifications are valid for 3 years. Renewal requires earning CE credits through Fortinet's continuing education program or retaking the current exam version. NSE 1-3 are valid for 2 years and renewed by retaking the free assessments.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between retake attempts for NSE 4 through NSE 7. NSE 1-3 may be retaken immediately. NSE 8 retake policies are scheduled separately through Fortinet.

official_study_resources.title: Fortinet Training Institute
official_study_resources.notes: Official self-paced and instructor-led training; free for NSE 1-3
